channel.title: Whalesbook Financial News
channel.description: Latest Indian and global financial market news

item.title: India's Retail Boom: Tier-2 Cities Lead Growth as Metros Struggle
item.description: India's retail market is splitting: Tier-1 cities struggle with old infrastructure and empty stores, while Tier-2 cities thrive with new, quality retail spaces and growing international brand presence. Tier-2 cities have added much more top-tier retail space since 2020, driven by strong consumer demand. Their success contrasts sharply with Tier-1 metros, many of which face around 60 'ghost malls'. This trend means brands and investors are increasingly focusing on the energy of smaller cities over the difficulties in larger ones.

item.title: Waaree Energies: Emkay Initiates 'Buy' Amid Integration Drive, Stock Muted
item.description: Waaree Energies is pushing aggressive backward integration and expanding into a full renewable platform to drive substantial growth. Emkay Global initiated coverage with a 'Buy' rating and ₹4,260 target price. However, the stock has seen muted performance recently due to margin pressures from rising costs and global competition. Despite these short-term challenges, strong sector growth and government policies support Waaree's long-term prospects, with analysts generally maintaining positive views.
